channel.title: Elemento Blog
channel.description: Cloud computing insights, industry news, and technology stories from Elemento.

item.title: The Future of Cloud: What "Cloud" Really Means, Why It's Centralized, and What Comes Next
item.description: A practical guide to what cloud really means, why current cloud models are centralized, and how interoperability, portability, and governance shape what comes next.
